item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: A Solana OG had 181K $SOL($14.2M) stolen. The thief sold all 181K $SOL, bridged the funds to #Ethereum, and swapped them for 7,918 $ETH($14.2M). According to @zachxbt. https://arkm.com/explorer/addres

item.title: After losing $4.4M on $SKHX and failing to profit from 2 long trades, this guy gave up and switched to long $NVDA. He opened a 3x long on 96,251 xyz:NVDA ($20.22M).

item.title: Marcus highlights Bitcoin’s recent strength against traditional markets. “We’ve seen Bitcoin actually put in some strength against the traditional markets ... which can also be explained by the recent
item.description: pMarcus highlights Bitcoin’s recent strength against traditional markets.br /br /“We’ve seen Bitcoin actually put in some strength against the traditional markets ... which can also be explained by the recent ETF inflows.”/pa href="https://nitter.net/Delphi_Digital/status/2075734222694728032#m"br /V

item.title: Polymarket Applies for US License to Offer Margin Trading
item.description: The filing would let Polymarket users open positions without posting full collateral, following Kalshi's FCM-backed perpetuals launch.

item.title: Sky Reports Record $419M Revenue Run-Rate for June 2026
item.description: Cumulative sUSDS yield payouts topped $250 million as Grove launched its GROVE governance token and a new Fixed Yield product crossed $44.1 million in TVL.

item.title: 📺 Our freshly published This Week in Crypto looks at which way the crows is leaning after a tumultuous week that included a withdrawn ceasefire, Robinhood Chain, and plenty of memecoin hype. We also l
item.description: p📺 Our freshly published This Week in Crypto looks at which way the crows is leaning after a tumultuous week that included a withdrawn ceasefire, Robinhood Chain, and plenty of memecoin hype. We also look at whether whales are coming back in! 👇br /a href="https://piped.video/watch?v=1DHCeusGq3g"pipe

item.title: RT by @0xngmi: LlamaSwap is now live on Robinhood Chain. Aggregating aggregators to find you the best swap route, with zero extra fees.

item.title: Uniswap has now surpassed $1 Billion in volume on Robinhood Chain since launch.
item.description: pUniswap has now surpassed $1 Billion in volume on Robinhood Chain since launch./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHM4JfDeWcAAWaIu.jpg" /

item.title: South Korea Super-App Toss to Run Won Stablecoin Pilot on OP Stack
item.description: Optimism says Toss is the fourth regulated financial institution in a year to pick the OP Stack, after Bitpanda, Kraken and Mitsui.

item.title: July 10 Update: #Bitcoin ETFs: 1D NetFlow: -1,791 BTC(-$114.58M)🔴 7D NetFlow: +5,098 BTC(+$326.11M)🟢 #Ethereum ETFs: 1D NetFlow: -27,487 ETH(-$49.09M)🔴 7D NetFlow: +37,036 ETH(+$66.15M)🟢

item.title: 📖 Find information & get crypto trading help by asking our FREE Telegram bot anything about the markets! Join our Santiment community here, tag @santiment_ai_bot followed by your question, then wait 1
item.description: p📖 Find information & get crypto trading help by asking our FREE Telegram bot anything about the markets! Join our Santiment community here, tag @santiment_ai_bot followed by your question, then wait 15-30 seconds for a well-crafted response. Feedback welcomed!br /br /🤖 Jump into Santiment’s Telegra

item.title: RT by @SantimentData: 🧑💻 Here are crypto’s top 10 privacy coin projects by development. Directional indicators represent each project's ranking positioning since last update: ➡️ 1) @chainlink $LINK 🥇

item.title: Whale 0xf02d closed his $HYPE short after holding it for nearly 2 months, taking a $4.52M loss. But he didn't give up. Instead, he opened another 10x short on 283,948 $HYPE ($19.34M). https://hyperbot

item.title: Circle Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
item.description: The stablecoin issuer received a charter for First National Digital Currency Bank, allowing it to custody digital assets and, eventually, hold USDC reserves under direct federal supervision. Shares rose more than 10%.

item.title: Fresh ATM Crypto Software Bugs: Jackpot or Bust?
item.description: Organizations, and possibly ATMs, are at risk of compromise, thanks to holes in a Microsoft BitLocker security wrapper.

item.title: R to @l2beat: Reproducibility maps to Openness. Can users rebuild the deployed contracts, circuits or verifier artifacts from published sources, and confirm what the onchain verifier is actually check

item.title: R to @l2beat: The exit window maps to Censorship Resistance. If governance changes the protocol, how much time do users have to react? And is there an escape path governance cannot remove? @TornadoCas
item.description: pThe exit window maps to Censorship Resistance.br /br /If governance changes the protocol, how much time do users have to react? And is there an escape path governance cannot remove?br /br /a href="https://nitter.net/TornadoCash" title="🌪️ Tornado.cash 🌪️"@TornadoCash/a core pools are immutable. a h

item.title: R to @l2beat: Trusted setups matter for Security. Some ZK systems rely on a one-time ceremony. If every participant colluded or the setup was compromised, invalid proofs could potentially be created,
item.description: pTrusted setups matter for Security.br /br /Some ZK systems rely on a one-time ceremony. If every participant colluded or the setup was compromised, invalid proofs could potentially be created, and funds stolen. In a correctly run multi-party ceremony, one honest participant is enough.br /br /a href

item.title: RT by @cryptoquant_com: Both speculative and spot demand are contracting at much less aggressive levels than last month. This and positive seasonal factors may support prices during July. Our latest r
item.description: pBoth speculative and spot demand are contracting at much less aggressive levels than last month.br /br /This and positive seasonal factors may support prices during July.br /br /Our latest report --&gt; br /Room to Run? Bitcoin Rebounds From Its Bear-Market Low as Seasonality and Recovering Demand

item.title: Atharv believes Strategy’s bankruptcy risk is overstated. “It would remain fine if Bitcoin continues to go down 30-50% from here. There’s going to be more pressure because the balance sheet starts sho
item.description: pAtharv believes Strategy’s bankruptcy risk is overstated.br /br /“It would remain fine if Bitcoin continues to go down 30-50% from here. There’s going to be more pressure because the balance sheet starts showing some red signs, but they don’t actually go bankrupt.”/pa href="https://nitter.net/Delph
